fixtureDescription: Proper-noun-heavy travel paragraph with city names, brands, and platforms
passage: Last summer, Emily traveled from Seoul to Tokyo with her friend Sarah. They visited the famous Shibuya district and ate at a McDonald's near Harajuku Station. Emily bought a new Samsung phone at a shop in Akihabara. On their last day, they took the Shinkansen to Osaka and visited Osaka Castle. Sarah posted all the photos on Instagram, and Emily shared them on Facebook. Their Korean friend Minho commented that he wanted to visit Japan too.
